title: Fresh Dense Tunisian Lemongrass Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic Tunisian dish featuring lemongrass, this tagine is perfect for adventurous eaters, made with fresh ingredients and a dense, hearty texture. It is ovo-vegetarian-friendly and can be served with crusty bread or over couscous.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the bottom of a clay or ceramic tagine or a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the bruised lemongrass and cook, stirring occasionally, until fragrant, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until it is lightly browned, about 8 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the cubed eggplant and sliced zucchini, and cook, stirring occasionally, until they start to soften, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the chickpeas, vegetable broth, and tomato paste, and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are tender, about 20 minutes.
Use a whisk to stir in the eggs and cook until the eggs are set, about 5 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then serve hot over couscous or with crusty bread.
